postReview.title: Berhalter impressed with Cuypers as Chicago Fire end Vancouver's perfect start
postReview.description: Gregg Berhalter was thrilled with Chicago Fire as they ended Vancouver Whitecaps' perfect start to the MLS campaign.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps v Chicago Fire: Berhalters looking forward to family affair in MLS
preReview.description: Father and son Gregg and Sebastian Berhalter come face-to-face in MLS on Saturday, as the Vancouver Whitecaps host the Chicago Fire.
